profile.bio: Senior Frontend / Full‑stack Engineer with 7+ years of experience building high‑load e‑commerce, fintech and B2B SaaS products for international companies including Grid Dynamics and T1 Innotech. I specialize in React, TypeScript, Next.js and Node.js/NestJS, focusing on web performance and scalable frontend architecture. Led cross‑functional teams, designed microservices‑based frontends and improved payment systems processing 1M+ daily transactions. Creator of SnowUI design system (50+ components) used in production projects. Fluent English (C1–C2), experienced in Agile/Scrum, open to fully remote senior/lead roles worldwide.
